name: Decompressor Routines
source: Common Z80 decompressor signatures (ZX0, ZX1, ZX7, MegaLZ, Exomizer, LZ48, LZ49, Pletter, Bitbuster, LZSA, Shrinkler)

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_std
anchors.comment: ZX0 v2 standard (68B) — LD BC,$FFFF / PUSH BC / INC BC / LD A,$80. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_turbo
anchors.comment: ZX0 v2 turbo (126B) — LD BC,$FFFF / LD (nn),BC / INC BC / LD A,$80 / JR / LD C,$FE / ADD A,A. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_turbo_back
anchors.comment: ZX0 v2 turbo backward (126B) — LD BC,1 / LD (nn),BC / LD A,$80 / JR. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_fast
anchors.comment: ZX0 v2 fast (187B) — LD IX,nn / LD BC,$FFFF / LD (nn),BC. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_fast_v1
anchors.comment: ZX0 v1 fast (191B) — SCF / EX AF,AF' / LD IX,nn / LD BC,$FFFF / LD (nn),BC. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_mega
anchors.comment: ZX0 v2 mega (673B) — LD BC,$FFFF / LD (nn),BC / INC BC / JR / LD C,$FE / ADD A,A. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_mega_back
anchors.comment: ZX0 v2 mega backward (676B) — LD BC,1 / LD (nn),BC / JR. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_zx0_back
anchors.comment: ZX0 v2 standard backward (69B) — LD BC,1 / PUSH BC / LD A,$80. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end. Note: also matches ZX1 backward (same opening)

anchors.label: decompress_zx1_std
anchors.comment: ZX1 standard (68B) — LD BC,$FFFF / PUSH BC / LD A,$80 / CALL. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx1_turbo
anchors.comment: ZX1 turbo (128B) — LD BC,$FFFF / LD (nn),BC / INC BC / LD A,$80 / JR / DEC B / LD C,(HL) / INC HL. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx1_mega
anchors.comment: ZX1 mega (406B) — LD BC,$FFFF / LD (nn),BC / INC BC / JR / DEC B / LD C,(HL) / INC HL. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx1_back
anchors.comment: ZX1 standard backward (68B) — LD BC,1 / PUSH BC / LD A,$80 / CALL / LDDR. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_zx1_turbo_back
anchors.comment: ZX1 turbo backward (128B) — LD BC,1 / LD (nn),BC / DEC C / LD A,$80 / JR. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_zx1_mega_back
anchors.comment: ZX1 mega backward (406B) — LD BC,1 / LD (nn),BC / DEC C / JR. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_zx7_std
anchors.comment: ZX7 standard (69B) — LD A,$80 / LDI / CALL getbit / JR NC. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx7_turbo
anchors.comment: ZX7 turbo (88B) — LD A,$80 / LDI / ADD A,A / CALL Z,getbit / JR NC. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_zx7b_slow
anchors.comment: ZX7B backward slow (64B) — LD BC,$8000 / LD A,B / INC C / LDD / CALL getbit. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_zx7b_medium
anchors.comment: ZX7B backward medium (67B) — LD BC,$8000 / LD A,B / INC C / LDD / ADD A,A / CALL Z. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_zx7b_fast
anchors.comment: ZX7B backward fast (191B) — LD A,$80 / LDD / ADD A,A / JR Z / JR C. Entry: HL=src end, DE=dst end

anchors.label: decompress_megalz
anchors.comment: MegaLZ V4 (110B) — LD A,$80 / EX AF,AF' / LD BC,$02FF / EX AF,AF'. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_exomizer
anchors.comment: Exomizer 2 (169B+156B buf) — LD IY,buf+11 / LD A,(HL) / INC HL / LD B,52 / PUSH DE / CP A. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_lz48
anchors.comment: LZ48 (83B) — LDI / LD B,0 / LD A,(HL) / INC HL / CP $10 / JR C. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_lz49
anchors.comment: LZ49 (~90B) — LDI / LD B,0 / LD A,(HL) / INC HL / LD IXL,A / AND $70. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_pletter
anchors.comment: Pletter 0.5c (~112B) — LD A,(HL) / INC HL / EXX / LD DE,0 / ADD A,A / INC A / RL E x4. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_bitbuster
anchors.comment: Bitbuster 1.2 (~172B) — INC HL x4 (skip header) / LD A,$80 / EXX / LD DE,1 / EXX. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_lzsa1
anchors.comment: LZSA1 (67B) — LD B,0 / LD A,(HL) / INC HL / PUSH AF / AND $70 / JR Z. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_lzsa2
anchors.comment: LZSA2 (134B) — XOR A / LD B,A / EX AF,AF' / JR ReadToken. Entry: HL=src, DE=dst

anchors.label: decompress_shrinkler
anchors.comment: Shrinkler (212B) — EXX / LD HL,$0A00 / LD BC,$0A80 / XOR A / DEC H / LD (HL),A / INC L / JR NZ. Entry: IX=src, DE=dst
